source.title: e-Handbook of Statistical Methods, 6.1.6 What is Process Capability?
source.license_review: Uses a small numerical example and formulas from an official United States government technical reference; no proprietary table, screenshot, or raw dataset is copied.

conventions.application_overall_mapping: NIST Cp/Cpk/Cpl/Cpu values map numerically to the application overall two_sided/min_side/lower/upper fields because both use sample standard deviation.
conventions.application_within_mapping: The application within fields use adjacent moving-range MRbar/d2 and are hand-checked separately; NIST does not publish that estimator for this example.
conventions.interpretation_limit: The three synthetic rows reproduce the published mean and sample standard deviation for formula verification only. They are not evidence that a process is stable, normal, or adequately sampled for a capability decision.
